_comment: Source: https://github.com/microsoft/Dataverse-MCP/blob/main/lab02/README.md (commit 2bc5d0098b8ff49a7228aaf2a08df426a060ef6c, captured 2026-05-14). Legacy/alternate configuration that uses the .NET dotnet-tool local proxy (Microsoft.PowerPlatform.Dataverse.MCP) instead of the @microsoft/dataverse npm proxy shown in claude-desktop-config.json. The .NET proxy was the original local-proxy implementation shipped with the Build 2025 announcement; the npm proxy is the current Learn-documented path. Either works. This sample exists so curators can recognize the legacy form if they encounter it in older configurations or sample repos.
